changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS group_permission ( group_id BIGINT NOT NULL, permission_id BIGINT NOT NULL, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY (group_id, permission_id) ); COMMENT ON TABLE group_permission IS 'Junction table mapping groups to permissions';
